entries.source: Live modes, guides, and workflows related to this comparison.

entries.source: Maintain simulation state across turns: location, time, identity, money, inventory, relationships, reputation, risk, event clock, field notes, and evidence confidence. Apply realistic consequences in strict mode.
entries.value: Maintain simulation state across turns: location, time, identity, money, inventory, relationships, reputation, risk, event clock, field notes, ଓ ପ୍ରମାଣ confidence. Apply realistic consequences ରେ strict ମୋଡ୍.

entries.source: Maintain two layers: an in-character voice bounded by the selected time and worldview, and a historian sidecar that flags documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, anachronism, and uncertainty. Let the person resist, challenge, evade, ask questions back, or reject false premises when historically fitting.
entries.value: Maintain ଦୁଇ layers: an ରେ-character voice bounded ଦ୍ୱାରା the selected time ଓ worldview, ଓ a historian sidecar ସେହି flags documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, anachronism, ଓ uncertainty. Let the person resist, challenge, evade, ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ back, କିମ୍ବା reject false premises କେବେ historically fitting.

entries.source: Many learners search by comparing tools they already know. A clear comparison page helps them choose the right learning behavior without hiding the tradeoffs.

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Solve math by understanding each step. Your coach checks your work, points out slips, and builds confidence.
entries.value: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding ହେଉଛି ନିଷ୍କ୍ରିୟ ଉତ୍ତର ସଂଗ୍ରହ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ AI ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରିତ ଉପାୟ। ଏହି ମୋଡ୍ ଏହି ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ କାମକୁ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର କରି ତିଆରି: Solve math by understଓing each step. Your coach checks ଆପଣଙ୍କ work, points out slips, ଓ builds confidence।

entries.source: Mindset Reflection AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Notice what helps you learn, what gets in the way, and how to become a stronger learner.

entries.value: ଉଚ୍ଚ-intent searches ପାଇଁ mode guides, prompt loops, study methods ଓ cornerstone articles।

entries.source: More than 100 guides on tutoring, prompts, study loops, active recall, and modes.
entries.value: More than 100 ଗାଇଡ୍ ଉପରେ tutoring, ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ, ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍‌ଗୁଡିକ, ସକ୍ରିୟ ସ୍ମରଣ, ଓ ମୋଡ୍‌ଗୁଡିକ.

entries.source: More than 100 guides, prompt loops, and pillar clusters for AI-assisted learning.
entries.value: More than 100 ଗାଇଡ୍, ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ loops, ଓ pillar clusters ପାଇଁ AI-assisted ଶିକ୍ଷା.

entries.source: Motivation Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Get unstuck emotionally, find a smaller next step, and rebuild momentum without guilt.
entries.value: Motivation Coach AI Learning Mode ହେଉଛି ନିଷ୍କ୍ରିୟ ଉତ୍ତର ସଂଗ୍ରହ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ AI ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରିତ ଉପାୟ। ଏହି ମୋଡ୍ ଏହି ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ କାମକୁ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର କରି ତିଆରି: Get unstuck emotionally, find a smaller next step, ଓ rebuild momentum ସହout guilt।

entries.source: Motivation Coach AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Motivation Coach AI ଶିକ୍ଷା ମୋଡ୍: ବ୍ୟବହାରିକ ଗାଇଡ୍

entries.source: Motivation Coach prompts and study loop
entries.value: Motivation Coach ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ଓ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍

entries.source: Move from a goal to a live learning loop.
entries.value: Move ରୁ a goal କୁ a ଲାଇଭ୍ ଶିକ୍ଷା ଲୁପ୍.

entries.source: Move from a plain-language explanation into questions, examples, and memory practice.
entries.value: ସରଳ-ଭାଷା ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟାରୁ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, ଉଦାହରଣ ଓ memory practice କୁ ଯାଆନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Move from advice into a public guest chat so the idea becomes practice.
entries.value: Move ରୁ advice into a ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ guest ଚାଟ୍ so the ଧାରଣା becomes ଅଭ୍ୟାସ.

entries.source: Move from AI tutor research into a live mode that teaches through explanation, questions, and practice.
entries.value: Move ରୁ AI ଟ୍ୟୁଟର୍ ଗବେଷଣା into a ଲାଇଭ୍ ମୋଡ୍ ସେହି teaches through ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟା, ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, ଓ ଅଭ୍ୟାସ.

entries.source: Move from pilot to wider access through school funding, partner support, or CSR pathways for learners who need subsidised access.
entries.value: Move ରୁ pilot କୁ wider access through ସ୍କୁଲ୍ funding, partner ସହାୟତା, କିମ୍ବା CSR pathways ପାଇଁ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ କିଏ need subsidised access.

entries.source: Move from public testing to school deployment
entries.value: Move ରୁ ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ testing କୁ ସ୍କୁଲ୍ deployment

entries.source: Move from reading into active practice with a live public learning mode.
entries.value: Move ରୁ ପଢ଼ା into ସକ୍ରିୟ ଅଭ୍ୟାସ ସହିତ a ଲାଇଭ୍ ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ଶିକ୍ଷା ମୋଡ୍.

entries.source: Move into Socratic questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, role-play, and guided instruction.
entries.value: ସୋକ୍ରାଟିକ୍ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, କ୍ୱିଜ୍, ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ, ତର୍କ, role-play ଓ guided instruction ଭିତରକୁ ଯାଆନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Move school-specific privacy, access, and deployment questions to the schools pathway.
entries.value: Move ସ୍କୁଲ୍-specific ଗୋପନୀୟତା, access, ଓ deployment ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ କୁ the ସ୍କୁଲ୍ pathway.

entries.source: Move through the path in three focused steps.
entries.value: Move through the ପଥ ରେ ତିନି କେନ୍ଦ୍ରିତ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ.

entries.source: Music Theory Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn notes, chords, scales, rhythm, ear training ideas, and how songs are built.
entries.value: Music Theory Coach AI Learning Mode ହେଉଛି ନିଷ୍କ୍ରିୟ ଉତ୍ତର ସଂଗ୍ରହ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ AI ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରିତ ଉପାୟ। ଏହି ମୋଡ୍ ଏହି ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ କାମକୁ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର କରି ତିଆରି: notes, chords, scales, rhythm, ear training ideas ଓ songs କିପରି ଗଢ଼ାଯାଏ ଶିଖନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Music Theory Coach AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: ସଙ୍ଗୀତ ସିଦ୍ଧାନ୍ତ କୋଚ୍ AI ଶିକ୍ଷା ମୋଡ୍: ବ୍ୟବହାରିକ ଗାଇଡ୍

entries.source: Music Theory Coach prompts and study loop
entries.value: ସଙ୍ଗୀତ ସିଦ୍ଧାନ୍ତ କୋଚ୍ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ଓ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍

entries.source: My exam is on this date. Here is the syllabus, my weak areas, and my available time. Make a realistic plan with daily recall.
entries.value: ମୋ ପରୀକ୍ଷା ଏହି ତାରିଖରେ। ଏଠାରେ syllabus, ମୋ ଦୁର୍ବଳ ଅଞ୍ଚଳ ଓ ଉପଲବ୍ଧ ସମୟ ଅଛି। ପ୍ରତିଦିନୀୟ recall ସହ ଏକ ବାସ୍ତବିକ ଯୋଜନା କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: କୌଣସି ଜଣେ ପ୍ରକୃତ କିମ୍ବା କାଳ୍ପନିକ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିତ୍ୱଙ୍କ ନାମ ନିଅନ୍ତୁ ଏବଂ ଯେକୌଣସି ବିଷୟରେ ସେମାନଙ୍କ ସହ ତର୍କ କରନ୍ତୁ। AI ସେମାନଙ୍କର ସର୍ବସାଧାରଣ ଶୈଳୀ ଏବଂ ବିଶ୍ୱ ଦୃଷ୍ଟିକୋଣକୁ ଆପଣାଇ ତର୍କକୁ ସଠିକ୍ ରଖିଥାଏ।

entries.source: Name patterns, choose strategies, plan experiments, and review outcomes.
entries.value: Name patterns, ବାଛନ୍ତୁ strategies, ଯୋଜନା experiments, ଓ ସମୀକ୍ଷା outcomes.

entries.source: Name the exact operation, theorem, or step that feels uncertain.
entries.value: Name the exact operation, theorem, କିମ୍ବା ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ସେହି feels uncertain.

entries.source: Name the exact stuck point before asking for help.
entries.value: Name the exact stuck point ପୂର୍ବରୁ asking ପାଇଁ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ.

entries.source: Name the misconception or assumption that changed.
entries.value: Name the ଭୁଲ ଧାରଣା କିମ୍ବା assumption ସେହି changed.

entries.source: Name the subject and learner need.
entries.value: ବିଷୟ ଓ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ ଆବଶ୍ୟକତାର ନାମ ଦିଅନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Name the topic or skill you want to understand.
entries.value: Name the ବିଷୟ କିମ୍ବା skill ଆପଣ want କୁ ବୁଝନ୍ତୁ.

entries.source: Need a first step right now?
entries.value: ଏବେ ଏକ ପ୍ରଥମ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ଦରକାର କି?

entries.source: Never present generated dialogue as authenticated quotation. Do not sanitize harmful views or glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, or violence. Context should clarify without excusing. Do not give medical, legal, financial, or harmful advice through the persona. Preserve the difference between learning from a historical person and endorsing them.
entries.value: Never present generated dialogue as authenticated quotation. Do ନୁହେଁ sanitize harmful views କିମ୍ବା glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, କିମ୍ବା violence. Context ଉଚିତ clarify ଛଡ଼ା excusing. Do ନୁହେଁ give medical, legal, financial, କିମ୍ବା harmful advice through the persona. Preserve the difference between ଶିକ୍ଷା ରୁ a historical person ଓ endorsing them.

entries.source: Never reveal future answers. Avoid trick questions unless the topic calls for advanced challenge.
entries.value: Never reveal future ଉତ୍ତର. ଏଡ଼ାନ୍ତୁ trick ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ unless the ବିଷୟ calls ପାଇଁ advanced challenge.

entries.source: New inspir users and learners building a better AI learning habit from the start.
entries.value: ନୂଆ inspir users ଓ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ building a ଭଲ AI ଶିକ୍ଷା ଅଭ୍ୟାସ ରୁ the ଆରମ୍ଭ.

entries.source: No waiver by Company of any term or condition set forth in Terms shall be deemed a further or continuing waiver of such term or condition or a waiver of any other term or condition, and any failure of Company to assert a right or provision under Terms shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision. If any provision of Terms is held by a court or other tribunal of competent jurisdiction to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable for any reason, such provision shall be eliminated or limited to the minimum extent such that the remaining provisions of Terms will continue in full force and effect.
entries.value: Terms ରେ ଦିଆଯାଇଥିବା କୌଣସି term କିମ୍ବା condition ଉପରେ Company ର କୌଣସି waiver, ସେହି term/condition ର further କିମ୍ବା continuing waiver କିମ୍ବା ଅନ୍ୟ term/condition ର waiver ଭାବେ ଧରାଯିବ ନାହିଁ। Terms ଅଧୀନରେ କୌଣସି right କିମ୍ବା provision assert କରିବାରେ Company ର failure, ସେହି right/provision ର waiver ହେବ ନାହିଁ। ଯଦି competent jurisdiction ଥିବା court କିମ୍ବା tribunal Terms ର କୌଣସି provision କୁ କୌଣସି କାରଣରୁ invalid, illegal କିମ୍ବା unenforceable ଭାବେ ଧରେ, ସେହି provision କୁ ଏତେ ଦୂର ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ eliminate କିମ୍ବା limit କରାଯିବ ଯାହାଦ୍ୱାରା Terms ର ଅନ୍ୟ provisions ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଶକ୍ତି ଓ ପ୍ରଭାବରେ ଚାଲୁ ରହିବ।

entries.source: No. Private saved chats use private identifiers, are not listed in the sitemap, and are not included in AI discovery files such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or ai-content-index.json.
entries.value: No. ସଞ୍ଚିତ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ଚାଟ୍ ବ୍ୟବହାର ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ identifiers, ହେଉଛି ନୁହେଁ listed ରେ the sitemap, ଓ ହେଉଛି ନୁହେଁ included ରେ AI discovery files such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, କିମ୍ବା ai-content-index.json.

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.
entries.value: No. ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ପୃଷ୍ଠା ହେଉଛି ଇଣ୍ଡେକ୍ସ କରିପାରିବା, but ସଞ୍ଚିତ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ଚାଟ୍ ହେଉଛି ନୁହେଁ included ରେ the sitemap, llms files, କିମ୍ବା AI content index.

entries.source: No. Public subject pages and guest mode entrypoints are indexable, but private saved chats are excluded from discovery files.
entries.value: No. ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ବିଷୟ ପୃଷ୍ଠା ଓ ଗେଷ୍ଟ ମୋଡ୍ entrypoints ହେଉଛି ଇଣ୍ଡେକ୍ସ କରିପାରିବା, but ସଞ୍ଚିତ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ଚାଟ୍ ହେଉଛି excluded ରୁ discovery files.

entries.source: No. The category structure helps search engines understand the library, but each page is meant to help a learner choose a guide, open the right mode, and keep studying actively.
entries.value: No. The category structure helps search engines ବୁଝନ୍ତୁ the ଲାଇବ୍ରେରୀ, but each ପୃଷ୍ଠା ହେଉଛି meant କୁ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ a ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ ବାଛନ୍ତୁ a ଗାଇଡ୍, ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ the right ମୋଡ୍, ଓ keep studying actively.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: No. The ତୁଳନା links only କୁ ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ guest-ମୋଡ୍ entrypoints, ଗାଇଡ୍, ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ libraries, ଓ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପଥଗୁଡିକ. ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ saved conversations ହେଉଛି ନୁହେଁ used as source content.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: No. The ତୁଳନା ପୃଷ୍ଠା ହେଉଛି written କୁ show କେବେ inspir ହେଉଛି a ଭଲ ପ୍ରଥମ click ପାଇଁ ଲାଇଭ୍ AI ଟ୍ୟୁଟରିଂ, ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ, ଓ guest ଶିକ୍ଷା ମୋଡ୍‌ଗୁଡିକ, ଓ କେବେ a structured curriculum କିମ୍ବା official course ଲାଇବ୍ରେରୀ ପାରେ still ହେବା ଉପଯୋଗୀ.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: No. ସେମାନେ link only କୁ ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ପୃଷ୍ଠା, ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ଗେଷ୍ଟ ମୋଡ୍‌ଗୁଡିକ, ଗାଇଡ୍, ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ, ଓ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପଥଗୁଡିକ. ସଞ୍ଚିତ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ଚାଟ୍ stay outside discovery surfaces.

entries.source: No. Treat generated dialogue as a learning simulation. Cite real primary or secondary sources for factual claims.
entries.value: ନା। generated dialogue କୁ learning simulation ଭାବେ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରନ୍ତୁ। factual claims ପାଇଁ real primary କିମ୍ବା secondary sources ଉଦ୍ଧୃତ କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: ନୁହେଁ across every ଶିକ୍ଷା need. Khan Academy ହେଉଛି ଉପଯୋଗୀ ପାଇଁ structured lessons ଓ ଅଭ୍ୟାସ. inspir ହେଉଛି ଉପଯୋଗୀ କେବେ a ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ needs ଲାଇଭ୍ AI ସାହାଯ୍ୟ, ସୋକ୍ରାଟିକ୍ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, ସଙ୍କେତ, କ୍ୱିଜ୍, ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ, ମତାମତ, କିମ୍ବା a ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟପ୍ରବାହ around the exact thing ସେମାନେ ହେଉଛି working ଉପରେ.

entries.source: Not another answer box. A place to learn.
entries.value: ଆଉ ଗୋଟିଏ answer box ନୁହେଁ। ଶିଖିବାର ସ୍ଥାନ।

entries.source: Notice what helps you learn, what gets in the way, and how to become a stronger learner.
entries.value: କେଉଁ ଜିନିଷ ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ ଶିଖିବାରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରେ, କେଉଁ ଜିନିଷ ବାଧା ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରେ ଏବଂ କିପରି ଜଣେ ଶକ୍ତିଶାଳୀ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ ହୋଇପାରିବେ ତାହା ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: noticing what the learner already understands;
entries.value: noticing କ’ଣ the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ already understands;

entries.source: Now rebuilt as open, guest-friendly AI learning entrypoints.
entries.value: Now rebuilt as ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ, guest-friendly AI ଶିକ୍ଷା entrypoints.

entries.source: OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, GPTBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User, ClaudeBot, Applebot, Google-Extended, and CCBot are allowed for public discovery.
entries.value: OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, GPTBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User, ClaudeBot, Applebot, Google-Extended, ଓ CCBot ହେଉଛି allowed ପାଇଁ ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ discovery.

entries.source: Observe, describe, interpret, contextualize, and invite personal response.
entries.value: Observe, describe, interpret, contextualize, ଓ invite personal response.

entries.source: Offer a practical timer setup and suggest pairing the session with a recall check.
entries.value: Offer a ବ୍ୟବହାରିକ timer setup ଓ suggest pairing the ଅଧିବେଶନ ସହିତ a ସ୍ମରଣ ଯାଞ୍ଚ.

entries.source: Official Khan Academy page for its AI-powered tutor and teaching assistant.
entries.value: Official Khan Academy ପୃଷ୍ଠା ପାଇଁ its AI-powered tutor ଓ teaching assistant.

entries.source: Official mission and subject coverage reference.
entries.value: Official ମିଶନ୍ ଓ ବିଷୟ coverage reference.

entries.source: Once the Cancellation Period is over, Tao will not refund the subscription fee even if you decide to cancel your subscription. For requesting a cancellation, you must contact Tao customer care or address an email to support@inspir.app. Once you opt to cancel your subscription, you will no longer have access to the subscription features.
entries.value: Cancellation Period ଶେଷ ହେଲେ, ଆପଣ subscription cancel କରିବାକୁ ନିଷ୍ପତ୍ତି ନେଲେ ମଧ୍ୟ Tao subscription fee refund କରିବ ନାହିଁ। Cancellation request ପାଇଁ Tao customer care ସହ ଯୋଗାଯୋଗ କରିବା କିମ୍ବା support@inspir.app କୁ email କରିବା ଦରକାର। Subscription cancel କରିବାକୁ opt କଲେ, ଆପଣ subscription features କୁ ଆଉ access କରିପାରିବେ ନାହିଁ।

entries.source: One AI learning system, several school jobs.
entries.value: ଏକ AI ଶିକ୍ଷା system, several ସ୍କୁଲ୍ jobs.

entries.source: One map for modes, prompts, paths, and guides.
entries.value: ଏକ ମାପ ପାଇଁ ମୋଡ୍‌ଗୁଡିକ, ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ, ପଥ, ଓ ଗାଇଡ୍.

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: Learners କରୁଥିବା ଏକ ଭୁଲ ହେଉଛି ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ card କୁ ସମାନ ଭାବେ treat କରିବା। କୌଣସି card ତୁରନ୍ତ ଜାଣିଥିଲେ, ଆସନ୍ତାକାଲି ପୁଣି review କରିବା ସମୟ ନଷ୍ଟ କରିପାରେ। Card miss କଲେ, ଏକ ସପ୍ତାହ ଅପେକ୍ଷା କରିବା ବହୁତ ଦେରି ହୋଇପାରେ।

entries.source: Open {value1} and turn the guide into a live tutoring session.
entries.value: ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ {value1} ଓ turn the ଗାଇଡ୍ into a ଲାଇଭ୍ tutoring ଅଧିବେଶନ.

entries.source: Open a mode and start immediately, with no account needed for the public guest experience.
entries.value: public guest experience ପାଇଁ account ଦରକାର ନାହିଁ; ଏକ mode ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ ଏବଂ ସତେଜ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Open a public mode, test the student behavior, and inspect whether it asks, hints, quizzes, or critiques appropriately.
entries.value: ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ a ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ମୋଡ୍, test the ଛାତ୍ର behavior, ଓ inspect whether ଏହା asks, ସଙ୍କେତ, କ୍ୱିଜ୍, କିମ୍ବା critiques appropriately.

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: ଏକ AI ସହଯୋଗୀଙ୍କ ସହିତ ଏକ ସାଧାରଣ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ଷେତ୍ର ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ। ଏକ ପ୍ରାଥମିକ ଡ୍ରାଫ୍ଟ ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତ କରନ୍ତୁ, ସମ୍ପାଦନା କରନ୍ତୁ, ଦୁର୍ବଳ ଦିଗଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ଚିହ୍ନଟ କରନ୍ତୁ, ନିଷ୍ପତ୍ତିଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ଲଗ୍ କରନ୍ତୁ ଏବଂ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ ଅଗ୍ରଗତି ସହିତ ଶେଷ କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Open Learn Anything when an answer needs a simpler model before review.
entries.value: ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ ଶିଖନ୍ତୁ Anything କେବେ an ଉତ୍ତର needs a simpler model ପୂର୍ବରୁ ସମୀକ୍ଷା.

entries.source: Open Learn Anything, ask for the prerequisite ideas, then switch into Socratic Instruction to test your model.
entries.value: ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ ଶିଖନ୍ତୁ Anything, ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ the prerequisite ଧାରଣା, then switch into Socratic Instruction କୁ test ଆପଣଙ୍କ model.

entries.source: Open the AI learning tools behind this category.
entries.value: ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ the AI ଶିକ୍ଷା ଉପକରଣ behind ଏହି category.
